critical.mandate: Quality gates must be enforced, not advisory

step.title: Detect CI Platform
step.action: Scan for existing CI config files: .github/workflows/, .gitlab-ci.yml, Jenkinsfile, .circleci/config.yml
If config found: note detected platform and present finding to user
If no config found: note that no existing CI platform was detected
step.ask: Which CI platform would you like to use? Options: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins, CircleCI, or other. {If detected: "Detected: {platform} — recommended based on existing config."}

step.title: Define Pipeline
step.action: Build > lint > test > coverage > deploy gates

step.title: Quality Gates
step.action: Define pass/fail thresholds: coverage %, test pass rate

step.title: Secrets Management
step.action: Identify all required secrets from architecture and PRD: API keys, database credentials, auth secrets, third-party service keys
Document how to add secrets to the selected CI platform (e.g., GitHub Repository Secrets, GitLab CI/CD Variables)
Define environment-level separation: which secrets differ between staging and production
List each secret with its name, purpose, and which pipeline stages need it

step.title: Deployment Strategy
step.action: Define staging deployment: auto-deploy on merge to develop branch after all gates pass
Define production deployment: deploy on merge to main with manual approval gate
Define rollback procedure: how to revert a failed deployment (rollback trigger, steps, verification)

step.title: Monitoring and Notifications
step.action: Configure pipeline failure notifications: Slack webhook, email, or platform-native alerts
Add pipeline status badge for the project README
Recommend metrics dashboard for pipeline health (run duration trends, failure rates, flaky test tracking)

step.title: Generate Pipeline Config
step.action: Generate CI config file (.github/workflows/ci.yml or equivalent)

step.title: Generate Output
step.action: Generate CI/CD pipeline configuration document with: pipeline stages, quality gates, secrets management, deployment strategy, and monitoring setup

next-step.primary: Validate implementation readiness before sprint planning
